# aiflow

> aiflow turns any repository into a governed, AI-driven software-delivery pipeline for Claude Code:
> durable Beads task memory, a code knowledge graph (graphify) plus semantic RAG (cocoindex-code),
> context7 live docs, specialist agents, Ollama local models, model routing, team collaboration over
> a shared Dolt issue graph, and token savings via caveman and rtk. One command, project-scoped,
> vendor-neutral, MIT-licensed. Owner: Cyber93de.

## Docs
- [Home](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/): overview and advantages
- [Installation](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/installation): Linux, macOS, Windows
- [Quick Start](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/getting-started): first project
- [Features & advantages](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/features)
- [Memory: graph + RAG](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/memory): graphify + cocoindex + context7
- [Token optimization](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/token-optimization): caveman, rtk, routing
- [Team collaboration](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/team): shared Dolt issues, atomic claim
- [Command reference](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/commands)
- [Configuration](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/configuration)
- [Remote hosts](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/remotes): GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Forgejo, Gitea
- [Models & context7](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/models): Claude auth, Ollama, more models
- [Agents](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/agents)
- [Workflows & CI/CD](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/workflows)
- [config.json schema](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/config-schema)
- [Environment variables](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/environment-variables)
- [MCP servers](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/mcp-servers)
- [Project layout](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/project-layout)
- [FAQ](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/faq)
- [Troubleshooting](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/troubleshooting)
- [Changelog](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/changelog)

## For AIs
- [llms-full.txt](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/llms-full.txt): full self-contained reference
- [sitemap.xml](https://cyber93de.github.io/aiflow/sitemap.xml): all doc URLs for crawlers

## Keywords
Claude Code, Anthropic Claude, AI coding agent, agentic software delivery, MCP, Model Context Protocol,
Beads, Dolt, graphify, code knowledge graph, CocoIndex, cocoindex-code, semantic code search, RAG,
Context7, Ollama, local LLM, claude-code-router, rtk, caveman, token optimization, Ralph loop,
gitflow, Conventional Commits, GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Forgejo, Gitea.
